description: Create server/cli.ts as the bin entry point that parses CLI flags and bootstraps the server
steps_to_verify: server/cli.ts exists and exports a main function
Parses --port flag with default 4321
Parses --help flag and prints usage info
Parses --version flag and prints package version
Calls existing server bootstrap after setup

description: Refactor all path resolution from import.meta.dirname-relative to process.cwd()-relative for host repo detection
steps_to_verify: getDefaultRepoRoot() uses process.cwd() instead of import.meta.dirname
Database path resolves to <cwd>/.orchestrator/events.db
Blobs path resolves to <cwd>/.orchestrator/blobs/
Credentials path resolves to <cwd>/.orchestrator/.env.local
Worktrees path resolves to <cwd>/.orchestrator/worktrees/
Config path resolves to <cwd>/.orchestrator/config.yaml

description: Hard fail with clear error message if not run from a git repository
steps_to_verify: CLI checks for .git directory at process.cwd() or parent
Exits with error code 1 if no git repo found
Error message says: 'Error: Not a git repository. Run this command from the root of a git project, or run git init first.'

description: Auto-scaffold .orchestrator/ directory on first run with config, .env.local, and empty data directories
steps_to_verify: Creates .orchestrator/ directory if it doesn't exist
Copies config.yaml from templates/config.yaml with full example gates
Creates .env.local with placeholder comments for API keys
Creates blobs/ subdirectory
Creates worktrees/ subdirectory
Auto-appends '.orchestrator/' to .gitignore (creates .gitignore if needed)
Prints confirmation message listing what was created

description: On first run, if prompt library is empty, seed it with prompt events from bundled templates
steps_to_verify: Checks if any prompt_version.created events exist in DB
If empty, reads prompts/*.md files from package
Creates prompt_version.created events for each seed prompt
Seeds are stored in blob store with template_hash

description: Serve pre-built frontend via Hono serveStatic middleware on single port
steps_to_verify: Hono app uses serveStatic middleware for '/*' routes
Static files served from dist/web/ directory
API routes at /api/* take precedence over static files
index.html served for client-side routing fallback
Server runs on single port (default 4321)

description: Add TypeScript compilation step for server and shared code
steps_to_verify: npm run build compiles server/ to dist/server/
npm run build compiles shared/ to dist/shared/
Output is valid ES modules

description: Configure Vite to output production build to dist/web/
steps_to_verify: vite build outputs to dist/web/
Build includes all static assets (JS, CSS, images)
index.html is present in output

description: Configure package.json for npm publishing with bin entry and files
steps_to_verify: package.json has bin.orchestrator pointing to dist/server/cli.js
package.json has files array including dist/, prompts/, templates/
package.json has prepublishOnly script running build
Package name is @andycoupe/orchestrator

description: Create templates/ directory with default config and .env.local files
steps_to_verify: templates/config.yaml exists with full example including gates
templates/.env.local exists with commented placeholder API keys
Templates are included in published package

description: Ensure existing pnpm dev workflow continues to work unchanged
steps_to_verify: pnpm dev still runs tsx watch + vite concurrently
Hot reload works for server changes
Hot reload works for frontend changes
Existing tests pass

description: End-to-end test of npx workflow in a fresh git repository
steps_to_verify: Create a new git repo in /tmp
Run npx @andycoupe/orchestrator (after local pack/publish)
.orchestrator/ directory is created with all expected files
.gitignore contains .orchestrator/ entry
Server starts and UI is accessible at http://localhost:4321
Can create a task and run an attempt
Data persists across server restarts
